name: True Strike
material: a weapon with which you have proficiency
description: Guided by a flash of magical insight, you make one attack with a weapon or an Unarmed Strike against one creature or object within reach or within range if the weapon has the Thrown property. On a hit, the target takes an extra 1d6 Radiant damage. You can use your spellcasting ability modifier, instead of Strength or Dexterity, for the attack and damage rolls. The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).
